description: FLUX.1-schnell (Black Forest Labs) — 12B rectified-flow transformer, 4-step distillation
_comment: FLUX.1-schnell is a 12-billion parameter rectified-flow DiT distilled for 1–4 step inference. Apache-2.0 license — commercial use allowed. Gated model: requires accepting license on HuggingFace and a valid HF token in .hf_token.
_comment_guidance: CRITICAL: guidance_scale MUST be 0.0 for FLUX.1-schnell. It is latent-adversarial-distilled (same principle as SDXL-Turbo) — any positive CFG scale degrades quality.
_comment_steps: Model card: 1–4 steps. 4 steps gives the best quality/speed balance. 1 step is sufficient for rough drafts.
_comment_size: FLUX natively supports arbitrary resolutions up to ~1 MP. 1024x1024 is the standard. 512x512–1024x1024 all work well.
_comment_dtype: bfloat16 is used automatically (hardcoded in flux_pipeline.py). Avoids NaN instabilities that float16 can cause in the FLUX transformer.
_comment_offload: STRONGLY RECOMMENDED on ≤16 GB unified memory. The FLUX transformer is ~12 GB in bfloat16. With sequential offload generation runs at ~16 GB peak at the cost of throughput.
_comment_token: Gated model — you must agree to the license on https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell and store your HF token in .hf_token before first use.
_comment_negative: Negative prompts have no effect at guidance_scale=0.0 and are silently ignored.
